app.title: All your agents are going async
app.author: zknill
app.description: Asynchronous agent framework for natural language processing
proposed_tests: Clone the repository, build and run the Zeta agent, verify output matches example
Use Zeta to simulate a conversation, measure response time and accuracy
Compare Zeta's performance against similar agents
